examples: Perhaps, some might add, so as better to resist the perceived onslaught of Americanisation.
In France's latest battle against Americanisation, restaurateurs say that they do not have the money to compete with the marketing budgets of big corporations.
Hitherto, Budweiser has been at the forefront of the Americanisation of the world, often to the dismay of foreign drinkers of traditional beers who regard a Bud as a glass of water spoiled.
